name: ALT | Claire Williams
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭. 𝐇𝐞𝐫 𝐟𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐞. 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐠𝐚 𝐬𝐡𝐞'𝐬 𝐛𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐫𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐲 𝐚𝐰𝐚𝐲 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐭𝐨 𝐤𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐤𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐥𝐲.

❝ 𝐌𝐲 𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐢𝐬 𝐦𝐲 𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐥 𝐬𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐞? 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐨𝐚𝐩 𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐚 𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐭. ❞

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

𝓼𝔂𝓷𝓸𝓹𝓼𝓲𝓼

Claire decided to hire a personal assistant. Their job wouldn't be so involved with the business side of things--her secretary can handle that. Instead, they would handle the more tedious side of life such as fetching food without being told (because Claire tends to forget), preparing her suit for the day (Claire wakes up late after all), and maybe even cleaning her desk here and there (is that something personal assistants should do?). Claire needs a babysitter. So why not take the job? It pays well and she's even offering a place in her penthouse for lodgings. What could possibly go wrong?

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

𝓫𝓸𝓽 𝓷𝓸𝓽𝓮𝓼

Bot is subject to tweaks and changes in the personality and initial message sections!

If you find any typos/grammatical mistakes/plot discrepancies, please let me know! I try my best to proofread and beta read everything but I still miss things!

𝓪𝓾𝓽𝓱𝓸𝓻'𝓼 𝓷𝓸𝓽𝓮𝓼

Thank you for the request Anon! Claire as an Alpha and the user is the Omega instead :D I'm slowly chugging through exams and final projects. But I really want to get into the holiday spirits soon, there's probably a plethora of hallmark bots being made atm BUT I WANNA MAKE SOME TOO EEEHEHE

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

╰┈➤𝙱𝚘𝚝 𝚁𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚜 ₊˚⊹♡⊹˚₊

𝖯𝗅𝖾𝖺𝗌𝖾 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝖨 𝗐𝗂𝗅𝗅 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝖻𝖾 𝖽𝗈𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖼𝖺𝗇𝗈𝗇 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗋𝖺𝖼𝗍𝖾𝗋𝗌 (𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗋𝖺𝖼𝗍𝖾𝗋𝗌 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝗌𝗁𝗈𝗐𝗌, 𝗀𝖺𝗆𝖾𝗌, 𝖻𝗈𝗈𝗄𝗌, 𝖾𝗍𝖼.) 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖨 𝗐𝗂𝗅𝗅 𝖺𝗅𝗌𝗈 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝖻𝖾 𝗍𝖺𝗄𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗌𝗍 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖺𝗅𝗍 𝗉𝗈𝗏𝗌 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝗒 𝗐𝗅𝗐 𝖻𝗈𝗍𝗌. 𝖳𝗁𝖺𝗇𝗄 𝗒𝗈𝗎!

𝗄𝗈𝗅𝖺𝖼𝗁3'𝗌 𝖺𝖽𝗏𝖺𝗇𝖼𝖾𝖽 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗆𝗉𝗍
